thought.text: 我将运行当前 Task3 评分建立基线。

action.command:
cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task3-score; printf '
--- score ---
'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3/score.txt 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,120p'; printf '
--- failed logs ---
'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3 -maxdepth 3 -name score.txt -type f | head -20 | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'echo ==={}===; cat {}'

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cmake --build /workspace/YatCC/build -t task3-score; printf '\\n--- score ---\\n'; cat /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3/score.txt 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,120p'; printf '\\n--- failed logs ---\\n'; find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task3 -maxdepth 3 -name score.txt -type f | head -20 | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'echo ==={}===; cat {}'", "timeout": 240, "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Run baseline task3 scoring"}
